sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_display_name (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_display_name (id, name) VALUES (1, displayName());
UPDATE test_display_name SET name = displayName() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, name, displayName() AS fqdn FROM test_display_name;
CREATE VIEW display_name_view AS SELECT displayName() AS display_name FROM test_display_name;
